stemHtml: What are the limits for a pilot who does not have a valid LVO (Low Visibility Operations) certificate?

options.a: Landing and taking off above 550 m RVR
options.b: Taking off above 550 m RVR and landing 400 m RVR
options.c: Landing 550 m RVR and taking off 400 m RVR
options.d: Landing and taking off above 400 m RVR
